functions.title: Guide Book #84
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #82§r
§lDeopard§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMedium mammal, Animal.
•§lSpawns in§r: Overgrown Jungle
•§lHealth§r: 16 §o(Wild)§r | 30 §o(Tamed)§r
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.3

•§lImmune to§r: Fall Damage.
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Chicken, Rabbit, Rat, Squirrel.
•§lHealed by§r: Chicken, Rabbit, Rat, Squirrel.
•§lBreeds with§r: Raw Chicken, Raw Rabbit, Raw Rat, Raw Squirrel.

•§lAging by§r: Chicken, Rabbit, Rat, Squirrel.
•§lTamed by§r: Cooked Chicken, Cooked Rabbit, Cooked Rat, Cooked Squirrel.
•§lPossible drops§r: Deopard Fur, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r §o(Wild)§r: Players, Illagers, Monsters.

•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Wild)§r: Chicken, Small mammals, Small birds, Medium birds.
•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Tamed)§r: Owner's attackers, Owner's targets.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2-3
•Wild Deopard can randomly sit.

•Tamed Deopard can be sat down.
•They can randomly spawn a §lDeopard Fur§r.
•They can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.
•Wild Deopard can pick up the food that tempts them and eat it.
•Wild Deopard carrying food will
temporarily stop being aggressive towards the mobs they are aggressive with.§’
